updates.title: Quoting Ally Piechowski
updates.title_zh: 如何审计Rails代码库：关键问题
updates.title_en: How to Audit a Rails Codebase: Key Questions
updates.tldr: 通过分角色提问揭示技术债务、流程风险和业务影响。
updates.what: Ally Piechowski提出的审计框架，包含针对开发者、CTO/工程经理和业务利益相关者的具体问题，用于诊断Rails应用的健康状况和遗留风险。
updates.why: 遗留系统常隐藏技术债务和流程瓶颈，这些问题帮助团队主动识别风险，改善部署实践，对齐业务目标，避免未来故障。
updates.action: 在团队会议或匿名调查中使用这些问题，优先处理高频或高风险项，并建立定期审计机制。
updates.tweet: Rails审计三连问：开发者恐惧点？周五部署？生产漏测？CTO：功能阻塞？监控？业务：沉默功能？停止承诺？立即行动！
updates.tldr_zh: 通过分角色提问揭示技术债务、流程风险和业务影响。
updates.tldr_en: Reveal technical debt, process risks, and business impact through role-specific questions.
updates.what_zh: Ally Piechowski提出的审计框架，包含针对开发者、CTO/工程经理和业务利益相关者的具体问题，用于诊断Rails应用的健康状况和遗留风险。
updates.what_en: An audit framework by Ally Piechowski with specific questions for developers, CTOs/EMs, and business stakeholders to diagnose Rails app health and legacy risks.
updates.why_zh: 遗留系统常隐藏技术债务和流程瓶颈，这些问题帮助团队主动识别风险，改善部署实践，对齐业务目标，避免未来故障。
updates.why_en: Legacy systems often hide technical debt and process bottlenecks. These questions help teams proactively identify risks, improve deployment practices, align business goals, and prevent future outages.
updates.action_zh: 在团队会议或匿名调查中使用这些问题，优先处理高频或高风险项，并建立定期审计机制。
updates.action_en: Use these questions in team meetings or anonymous surveys, prioritize high-frequency or high-risk items, and establish a regular audit cadence.
updates.tweet_zh: 审计Rails代码库？先问：开发者怕碰哪块代码？上次周五部署何时？生产90天内漏测故障？CTO：功能卡住超一年？实时错误监控？业务方：悄悄关闭的功能？停止承诺的需求？全面诊断技术债务。
updates.tweet_en: Auditing a Rails codebase? Start with: What area are developers afraid to touch? Last Friday deploy? Production breaks in 90 days not caught by tests? CTO: Feature blocked >1 year? Real-time error visibility? Business: Features quietly turned off? Stopped prom
updates.x_zh: Rails审计三连问：开发者恐惧点？周五部署？生产漏测？CTO：功能阻塞？监控？业务：沉默功能？停止承诺？立即行动！
updates.x_en: Rails audit: Devs' fear area? Friday deploy? Missed production breaks? CTO: Blocked features? Error visibility? Biz: Silent features? Broken promises? Act now!
updates.linkedin_zh: 在技术债务审计中，角色化提问能高效暴露问题。建议：1. 开发者自检恐惧点；2. 管理层评估部署与监控；3. 业务方复盘功能生命周期。立即在回顾会议中引入这些问题，驱动系统性改进，提升代码库健康度。
updates.linkedin_en: Role-specific questions efficiently expose issues in tech debt audits. Recommendations: 1. Developers self-assess fear areas; 2. Management evaluates deployment and monitoring; 3. Business reviews feature lifecycles. Introduce these in retrospectives to drive systemic improvements and boost codebase health.
updates.threads_zh: 聊聊你的Rails项目：最不敢动的代码是哪个？周五部署过吗？生产环境出过测试没cover的bug？业务上有没有悄悄下线又没恢复的功能？来吐槽一下！
updates.threads_en: Let's discuss your Rails projects: What code are you most afraid to touch? Ever deploy on a Friday? Production bugs missed by tests? Features quietly turned off? Share your stories!

updates.title: Google’s Threat Intelligence Group on Coruna a Powerful iOS Exploit Kit of Mysterious Origin
updates.title_zh: 谷歌威胁情报组披露 Coruna：一个来源不明的强大 iOS 漏洞利用工具包
updates.title_en: Google’s Threat Intelligence Group on Coruna, a Powerful iOS Exploit Kit of Mysterious Origin
updates.tldr: 名为 Coruna 的 iOS 漏洞利用工具包包含 23 个漏洞利用，影响 iOS 13-17.2.1，已被监控软件商、俄间谍组织及中国黑客多次使用，揭示活跃的零日漏洞二手市场。
updates.what: Coruna 是一个模块化 iOS 漏洞利用工具包，包含 5 条完整利用链和 23 个漏洞利用。其核心价值在于集成了针对多个 iOS 版本的、使用非公开技术及绕过缓解措施的先进漏洞利用，可被不同威胁行为者组合使用。
updates.why: 1. 技术影响：展示了高级漏洞利用技术的扩散，单个工具包被不同国家背景和动机的行为者使用。2. 市场信号：证实存在活跃的零日漏洞“二手市场”，监控软件商可能是初始来源。3. 开发启示：凸显了即使是最新 iOS 版本也可能存在被集成到复杂工具包中的未知漏洞，对移动应用安全开发和第三方组件审计提出更高要求。
updates.action: 1. 立即行动：确保所有 iOS 设备已更新至最新版本（iOS 17.3+），以修复已知关联漏洞。2. 监控威胁：订阅 Google Threat Intelligence Group (GTIG) 等权威情报源警报。3. 代码审计：审查应用中集成的第三方 SDK 或库，特别是那些处理敏感数据或权限的组件。4. 纵深防御：在移动应用中实施运行时完整性检查、反调试和代码混淆，增加攻击成本。
updates.tweet: Coruna 工具包证明，顶级漏洞利用技术会像商品一样在暗网流通。你的应用是否依赖的某个 SDK 可能已内置了未公开的利用链？立即行动：1. 强制设备更新 2. 实施运行时保护 3. 订阅 GTIG 情报。安全不是功能，是基础设施。
updates.tldr_zh: 名为 Coruna 的 iOS 漏洞利用工具包包含 23 个漏洞利用，影响 iOS 13-17.2.1，已被监控软件商、俄间谍组织及中国黑客多次使用，揭示活跃的零日漏洞二手市场。
updates.tldr_en: The 'Coruna' iOS exploit kit, with 23 exploits affecting iOS 13-17.2.1, has been used by surveillance vendors, Russian espionage groups, and Chinese financially motivated actors, revealing an active market for 'second-hand' zero-days.
updates.what_zh: Coruna 是一个模块化 iOS 漏洞利用工具包，包含 5 条完整利用链和 23 个漏洞利用。其核心价值在于集成了针对多个 iOS 版本的、使用非公开技术及绕过缓解措施的先进漏洞利用，可被不同威胁行为者组合使用。
updates.what_en: Coruna is a modular iOS exploit kit containing 5 full exploit chains and 23 individual exploits. Its core technical value lies in its comprehensive collection of advanced, non-public exploitation techniques and mitigation bypasses for multiple iOS versions, designed for reuse and modification by various threat actors.
updates.why_zh: 1. 技术影响：展示了高级漏洞利用技术的扩散，单个工具包被不同国家背景和动机的行为者使用。2. 市场信号：证实存在活跃的零日漏洞“二手市场”，监控软件商可能是初始来源。3. 开发启示：凸显了即使是最新 iOS 版本也可能存在被集成到复杂工具包中的未知漏洞，对移动应用安全开发和第三方组件审计提出更高要求。
updates.why_en: 1. Technical Impact: Demonstrates the proliferation of sophisticated exploit capabilities, with a single kit leveraged by actors of different nationalities and motivations. 2. Market Signal: Confirms an active market for 'second-hand' zero-days, with commercial surveillance vendors as a likely initial source. 3. Dev Implication: Highlights that even recent iOS versions may harbor unknown vulnerabilities weaponized in complex kits, underscoring the need for rigorous mobile app security development and third-party component auditing.
updates.action_zh: 1. 立即行动：确保所有 iOS 设备已更新至最新版本（iOS 17.3+），以修复已知关联漏洞。2. 监控威胁：订阅 Google Threat Intelligence Group (GTIG) 等权威情报源警报。3. 代码审计：审查应用中集成的第三方 SDK 或库，特别是那些处理敏感数据或权限的组件。4. 纵深防御：在移动应用中实施运行时完整性检查、反调试和代码混淆，增加攻击成本。
updates.action_en: 1. Immediate: Ensure all iOS devices are updated to the latest version (iOS 17.3+) to patch known associated vulnerabilities. 2. Monitor: Subscribe to alerts from authoritative sources like Google Threat Intelligence Group (GTIG). 3. Audit: Review third-party SDKs or libraries integrated into your apps, especially those handling sensitive data or permissions. 4. Defend-in-Depth: Implement runtime integrity checks, anti-debugging, and code obfuscation in mobile apps to increase attacker cost.
updates.tweet_zh: 谷歌披露 Coruna：一个集成了 23 个 iOS 漏洞利用的强大工具包，影响 13-17.2.1 版本。它从监控软件商流向俄间谍组织，再到中国黑客，揭示了零日漏洞的二手市场。开发者必须立即更新并加强第三方组件审计。#iOS安全 #漏洞利用
updates.tweet_en: Google reveals 'Coruna': a powerful iOS exploit kit with 23 exploits (iOS 13-17.2.1). It proliferated from surveillance vendors to Russian spies to Chinese hackers, exposing a 'second-hand' zero-day market. Developers: update immediately & audit third-party co
updates.x_zh: Coruna 工具包证明，顶级漏洞利用技术会像商品一样在暗网流通。你的应用是否依赖的某个 SDK 可能已内置了未公开的利用链？立即行动：1. 强制设备更新 2. 实施运行时保护 3. 订阅 GTIG 情报。安全不是功能，是基础设施。
updates.x_en: The Coruna kit proves top-tier exploits circulate like commodities. Could that SDK your app depends on harbor a hidden exploit chain? Action steps: 1. Enforce device updates 2. Implement runtime protections 3. Subscribe to GTIG intel. Security isn't a feature;
updates.linkedin_zh:
谷歌最新报告揭示了名为 Coruna 的 iOS 漏洞利用工具包如何在不同威胁行为者间流转。这不仅是安全事件，更是对移动开发生命周期的警示：

1. **供应链风险**：第三方组件可能引入未知漏洞利用链。
2. **零日经济**：存在活跃的漏洞“二手市场”，加速威胁扩散。
3. **纵深防御必要性**：仅依赖系统更新不足，需在应用层增加反调试、完整性校验。

建议：立即审查移动应用依赖项，订阅威胁情报，并将安全左移至开发流程。安全是持续过程，而非一次性补丁。
updates.linkedin_en:
Google's latest report details how the 'Coruna' iOS exploit kit proliferated among diverse threat actors. This isn't just a security incident; it's a wake-up call for mobile development lifecycle:

1. **Supply Chain Risk**: Third-party components can introduce unknown exploit chains.
2. **Zero-Day Economy**: An active 'second-hand' market accelerates threat diffusion.
3. **Defense-in-Depth Imperative**: Relying solely on OS updates is insufficient; app-layer anti-debugging and integrity checks are critical.

Action: Audit your mobile app dependencies now, subscribe to threat intel, and shift security left. Security is a continuous process, not a one-time patch.
updates.threads_zh:
Coruna 工具包有多可怕？它同时攻击 5 个 iOS 版本，用 23 个漏洞组合成完整利用链，连苹果的缓解措施都绕过了。

更关键的是，它像“武器”一样被转卖：监控软件商 → 俄黑客 → 中国 financially motivated 组织。

这意味着什么？你的应用如果集成了有问题的 SDK，可能间接成为攻击跳板。开发者不能只等苹果更新，必须主动审计代码和运行时行为。

大家怎么看这种零日漏洞的二手市场？
updates.threads_en:
How potent is the Coruna kit? It targeted 5 iOS versions simultaneously, chaining 23 exploits with non-public techniques that bypass Apple's mitigations.

More critically, it proliferated like a 'weapon': surveillance vendor → Russian espionage group → Chinese financially motivated actors.

What does this mean? If your app integrates a compromised SDK, it could become an indirect attack vector. Developers can't just wait for Apple updates; proactive code and runtime audits are essential.

Thoughts on this 'second-hand' zero-day market?

updates.title: The Verge Interviews Tim Sweeney After Victory in ‘Epic v. Google’
updates.title_zh: Epic诉谷歌案胜诉后，Tim Sweeney接受The Verge采访
updates.title_en: The Verge Interviews Tim Sweeney After Victory in ‘Epic v. Google’
updates.tldr: Sweeney称苹果反垄断手段隐蔽（ice），谷歌则留下书面证据（fire）。但谷歌新费率分‘现有/新安装’复杂难懂，开发者需警惕实际成本。
updates.what: 本案核心是平台垄断策略：苹果强制统一条款，谷歌通过付费协议排挤竞争。但谷歌新政策按‘现有/新安装’分费率，可能增加开发者成本。
updates.why: 开发者受直接影响：分发渠道受限、支付系统强制、费率不透明。法律结果将重塑移动生态，决定创新空间。
updates.action: 1. 细读谷歌新条款，计算不同场景成本；2. 探索第三方商店或直接分发；3. 关注后续诉讼与监管动态。
updates.tweet: Sweeney对比苹果（隐蔽）与谷歌（留证）反垄断手段，但谷歌新费率结构复杂。开发者需仔细评估‘现有/新安装’分档对业务的影响，并考虑分发渠道多元化。
updates.tldr_zh: Sweeney称苹果反垄断手段隐蔽（ice），谷歌则留下书面证据（fire）。但谷歌新费率分‘现有/新安装’复杂难懂，开发者需警惕实际成本。
updates.tldr_en: Sweeney says Apple’s antitrust tactics are covert (ice), while Google’s are documented (fire). However, Google’s new fee structure splitting ‘existing/new installs’ is confusing—developers must watch real costs.
updates.what_zh: 本案核心是平台垄断策略：苹果强制统一条款，谷歌通过付费协议排挤竞争。但谷歌新政策按‘现有/新安装’分费率，可能增加开发者成本。
updates.what_en: The case highlights platform monopolies: Apple enforces uniform terms, Google paid partners to avoid competition. Google’s new policy splits fees by ‘existing vs. new installs,’ potentially raising developer costs.
updates.why_zh: 开发者受直接影响：分发渠道受限、支付系统强制、费率不透明。法律结果将重塑移动生态，决定创新空间。
updates.why_en: Developers are directly impacted: restricted distribution, forced payment systems, opaque fees. Legal outcomes will reshape mobile ecosystems and innovation space.
updates.action_zh: 1. 细读谷歌新条款，计算不同场景成本；2. 探索第三方商店或直接分发；3. 关注后续诉讼与监管动态。
updates.action_en: 1. Scrutinize Google’s new terms, model costs per scenario; 2. Explore alternative stores or direct distribution; 3. Monitor follow-up lawsuits and regulations.
updates.tweet_zh: Sweeney：苹果‘冰’（内部隐蔽），谷歌‘火’（书面证据）。但谷歌新费率分‘现有/新安装’，复杂难懂。开发者慎防成本陷阱！#EpicvGoogle #移动开发
updates.tweet_en: Sweeney: Apple is ‘ice’ (covert), Google is ‘fire’ (documented). But Google’s new fees split ‘existing/new installs’—confusing. Developers, watch your costs. #EpicvGoogle #MobileDev
updates.x_zh: Sweeney对比苹果（隐蔽）与谷歌（留证）反垄断手段，但谷歌新费率结构复杂。开发者需仔细评估‘现有/新安装’分档对业务的影响，并考虑分发渠道多元化。
updates.x_en: Sweeney contrasts Apple’s covert vs. Google’s documented antitrust tactics, but Google’s new fee structure is complex. Developers must assess ‘existing/new install’ tiers’ impact and consider diversifying distribution.
updates.linkedin_zh: Epic诉谷歌案胜诉揭示平台垄断策略差异：苹果隐蔽控制，谷歌留下书面证据。但谷歌新费率结构复杂，按安装类型分档，可能增加开发者成本。建议：1. 详细评估新条款对业务的影响；2. 考虑多元化分发渠道以降低风险；3. 持续关注反垄断诉讼进展，调整合规策略。
updates.linkedin_en: Epic’s win over Google highlights differing monopoly tactics: Apple’s covert control vs. Google’s documented deals. Yet Google’s new fee structure—splitting by ‘existing/new installs’—is complex and may raise costs. Recommendations: 1. Model financial impact under new terms; 2. Diversify distribution channels; 3. Monitor antitrust developments for strategic adjustments.
updates.threads_zh: Sweeney说苹果是‘冰’，谷歌是‘火’，但谷歌新费率复杂，开发者真的赢了吗？你们怎么计算‘现有安装’ vs ‘新安装’的成本？来聊聊实际影响！#开发者讨论
updates.threads_en: Sweeney calls Apple ‘ice’ and Google ‘fire,’ but Google’s new fees are messy. Are developers really winning? How do you calculate ‘existing vs. new install’ costs? Share your take! #DevDiscussion

updates.title: Tim Sweeney Signed Away His Right to Criticize Google’s Play Store Until 2032
updates.title_zh: Epic CEO Tim Sweeney签署协议，2032年前不得批评Google Play商店政策
updates.title_en: Epic CEO Tim Sweeney Signed Away His Right to Criticize Google’s Play Store Until 2032
updates.tldr: 在Epic与Google的和解中，Tim Sweeney个人承诺至2032年不批评Google应用商店政策，甚至需公开赞扬，同时其资助的‘应用公平联盟’被限制仅可针对苹果。
updates.what: 根据和解条款，Sweeney签署了具有约束力的协议，放弃Epic及其个人就Google应用分发、费用、政策等事项提起诉讼或发表负面评论的权利，并承诺以‘善意’倡导Google模式。Epic独家资助的‘应用公平联盟’也被限制仅能针对苹果。
updates.why: Google通过此条款消除关键批评者的声音，确保和解的长期稳定性，并将行业公平讨论的矛头引向苹果。Sweeney的同意可能源于Epic获得的费用减免（如20%分成降低）等实际利益，但以个人言论自由和联盟中立性为代价。
updates.action: 开发者应仔细审查与平台签订的协议，警惕可能限制言论或倡导义务的条款；持续关注应用商店政策动态，通过合规渠道反馈；参与行业组织时，需了解其资金背景与行动限制，独立评估其立场。
updates.tweet: Google让Epic CEO封口至2032年，还逼他夸自己。所谓的‘应用公平联盟’只剩攻击苹果。这揭示平台权力如何通过协议限制行业批评。开发者：你的合同里也有沉默条款吗？
updates.tldr_zh: 在Epic与Google的和解中，Tim Sweeney个人承诺至2032年不批评Google应用商店政策，甚至需公开赞扬，同时其资助的‘应用公平联盟’被限制仅可针对苹果。
updates.tldr_en: In Epic's settlement with Google, Tim Sweeney personally agreed not to criticize Google's app store policies until 2032 and must praise them, while the 'Coalition for App Fairness' he funded is restricted to targeting only Apple.
updates.what_zh: 根据和解条款，Sweeney签署了具有约束力的协议，放弃Epic及其个人就Google应用分发、费用、政策等事项提起诉讼或发表负面评论的权利，并承诺以‘善意’倡导Google模式。Epic独家资助的‘应用公平联盟’也被限制仅能针对苹果。
updates.what_en: Per the binding term sheet, Sweeney agreed to waive Epic's and his own rights to sue or disparage Google over app distribution, fees, and policies, and to advocate in good faith for Google's model. The 'Coalition for App Fairness,' solely funded by Epic, is restricted to focusing on Apple only.
updates.why_zh: Google通过此条款消除关键批评者的声音，确保和解的长期稳定性，并将行业公平讨论的矛头引向苹果。Sweeney的同意可能源于Epic获得的费用减免（如20%分成降低）等实际利益，但以个人言论自由和联盟中立性为代价。
updates.why_en: Google aims to silence a key critic and ensure long-term settlement stability, redirecting industry fairness discourse toward Apple. Sweeney's consent likely stems from tangible benefits for Epic (e.g., reduced fees), at the cost of personal speech and coalition neutrality.
updates.action_zh: 开发者应仔细审查与平台签订的协议，警惕可能限制言论或倡导义务的条款；持续关注应用商店政策动态，通过合规渠道反馈；参与行业组织时，需了解其资金背景与行动限制，独立评估其立场。
updates.action_en: Developers should scrutinize platform agreements for clauses restricting speech or mandating advocacy; monitor app store policy changes and provide feedback through official channels; when joining industry groups, assess their funding and operational constraints independently.
updates.tweet_zh: Epic CEO Tim Sweeney签署协议，2032年前不得批评Google Play，必须赞扬其政策。其资助的‘应用公平联盟’被限制仅可针对苹果。开发者警惕：平台协议可能买断你的发声权。 #游戏开发 #应用商店
updates.tweet_en: Epic CEO Tim Sweeney agreed not to criticize Google Play until 2032 and must praise its policies. The 'Coalition for App Fairness' he funded can only target Apple now. Devs beware: platform deals can buy your voice. #gamedev #appstore
updates.x_zh: Google让Epic CEO封口至2032年，还逼他夸自己。所谓的‘应用公平联盟’只剩攻击苹果。这揭示平台权力如何通过协议限制行业批评。开发者：你的合同里也有沉默条款吗？
updates.x_en: Google muzzled Epic's CEO until 2032 and made him praise them. The so-called 'Coalition for App Fairness' is now Apple-only. Shows how platform power uses contracts to silence critique. Devs: does your agreement have a gag clause?
updates.linkedin_zh:
Epic与Google和解条款揭示：科技巨头可通过协议限制关键人物的公开批评，甚至要求‘善意倡导’。这引发对行业倡导组织独立性的质疑。

建议：1. 审查与平台协议中的言论限制条款；2. 多元化反馈渠道，不依赖单一联盟；3. 关注政策变化，以合规方式参与规则塑造。

#科技政策 #应用经济 #开发者权益
updates.linkedin_en:
Epic-Google settlement reveals: tech giants can use contracts to restrict key figures' criticism and mandate 'good faith advocacy.' Raises questions about industry coalition independence.

Actionable insights: 1. Scrutinize platform agreements for speech restrictions; 2. Diversify feedback channels beyond single coalitions; 3. Monitor policy shifts and engage through compliant avenues.

#TechPolicy #AppEconomy #DeveloperRights
updates.threads_zh:
Epic CEO签协议2032年前不能骂Google Play，还得夸它。他出钱搞的‘应用公平联盟’现在只能打苹果。

这波操作：平台用和解买断批评权，把‘公平’斗争变成单挑。

开发者们，你们觉得这种协议合理吗？平台权力边界在哪？
updates.threads_en:
Epic's CEO signed a deal: no criticizing Google Play until 2032, must praise it. His own 'Coalition for App Fairness' can only target Apple now.

Platforms buying silence with settlements? Turning 'fairness' fights into one-on-one.

Devs: are such deals acceptable? Where should platform power draw the line?

updates.title: Anthropic and the Pentagon
updates.title_zh: Anthropic与五角大楼：AI伦理牌的商业价值
updates.title_en: Anthropic and the Pentagon: The Commercial Value of AI Ethics
updates.tldr: AI模型性能趋同，Anthropic以'道德AI'品牌赢得五角大楼合同，凸显伦理定位在商品化市场中的商业价值。
updates.what: 分析AI大模型性能趋同后，供应商如何通过'道德AI'品牌叙事（如Anthropic）获取高价值政府与企业合同，而非仅依赖技术指标。
updates.why: 1. 技术选型：客户（尤其政府/金融）将伦理合规纳入采购标准。2. 职业发展：'AI安全/伦理'成为高价值技能。3. 基础设施：可信AI需可审计、可解释的技术栈。
updates.action: 1. 评估模型时，审查供应商的伦理框架与第三方审计报告。2. 在项目中集成模型卡（Model Cards）与安全护栏。3. 关注NIST AI风险管理框架等标准。
updates.tweet: Anthropic与五角大楼合同揭示：AI商品化时代，'道德AI'品牌成关键差异点。对开发者：伦理合规、安全技能、可审计架构是未来重点。 #AI安全 #基础设施
updates.tldr_zh: AI模型性能趋同，Anthropic以'道德AI'品牌赢得五角大楼合同，凸显伦理定位在商品化市场中的商业价值。
updates.tldr_en: With AI models becoming commodities, Anthropic's 'ethical AI' branding secured a Pentagon contract, highlighting the commercial value of trust in a crowded market.
updates.what_zh: 分析AI大模型性能趋同后，供应商如何通过'道德AI'品牌叙事（如Anthropic）获取高价值政府与企业合同，而非仅依赖技术指标。
updates.what_en: Analysis of how, as LLM performance converges, vendors like Anthropic use 'ethical AI' branding narratives to win high-value government/enterprise contracts beyond pure technical benchmarks.
updates.why_zh: 1. 技术选型：客户（尤其政府/金融）将伦理合规纳入采购标准。2. 职业发展：'AI安全/伦理'成为高价值技能。3. 基础设施：可信AI需可审计、可解释的技术栈。
updates.why_en: 1. Tech Selection: Clients (gov/finance) now factor ethics into procurement. 2. Career Impact: 'AI safety/ethics' is a high-value skill. 3. Infrastructure: Trustworthy AI requires auditable, explainable stacks.
updates.action_zh: 1. 评估模型时，审查供应商的伦理框架与第三方审计报告。2. 在项目中集成模型卡（Model Cards）与安全护栏。3. 关注NIST AI风险管理框架等标准。
updates.action_en: 1. When evaluating models, audit vendor ethics frameworks & third-party reports. 2. Implement Model Cards & safety guardrails in your projects. 3. Track standards like NIST AI Risk Management Framework.
updates.tweet_zh: AI模型性能越来越像，拼技术已不够。Anthropic靠'道德AI'品牌拿下五角大楼合同，说明伦理已是商业竞争力。开发者需关注：1. 伦理合规成采购标准 2. 安全/伦理技能溢价 3. 可审计技术栈。 #AI #Security
updates.tweet_en: LLMs are becoming commodities. Anthropic won a Pentagon contract with 'ethical AI' branding—ethics is now a business advantage. Devs take note: 1. Ethics in procurement 2. Safety/ethics skills in demand 3. Auditable stacks matter. #AI #Security
updates.x_zh: Anthropic与五角大楼合同揭示：AI商品化时代，'道德AI'品牌成关键差异点。对开发者：伦理合规、安全技能、可审计架构是未来重点。 #AI安全 #基础设施
updates.x_en: Anthropic's Pentagon deal shows: In the AI commodity era, 'ethical AI' branding is a key differentiator. For devs: ethics compliance, safety skills, auditable architecture are priorities. #AISecurity #Infrastructure
updates.linkedin_zh: AI大模型性能趋同，竞争焦点转向品牌信任与伦理合规。Anthropic以'道德AI'定位赢得五角大楼合同，预示未来采购标准将纳入伦理评估。建议：1. 在技术方案中集成伦理风险评估 2. 学习NIST AI风险管理框架 3. 优先选择提供透明模型卡的供应商。 #人工智能 #网络安全 #职业发展
updates.linkedin_en: As LLM performance converges, competition shifts to brand trust & ethical compliance. Anthropic's 'ethical AI' branding secured a Pentagon contract, signaling ethics in procurement. Actionable steps: 1. Integrate ethical risk assessment into your tech stack. 2. Study NIST AI Risk Management Framework. 3. Prioritize vendors with transparent Model Cards. #AI #Cybersecurity #Career
updates.threads_zh: Anthropic拿五角大楼合同，不是靠技术碾压，而是'道德AI'人设。AI越来越像commodity，品牌伦理成卖点。开发者们，你们项目里会考虑供应商的伦理记录吗？还是纯看性能/价格？ #AI #开发者讨论
updates.threads_en: Anthropic's Pentagon win wasn't about better tech—it was the 'ethical AI' brand. As AI becomes a commodity, ethics is a selling point. Devs: Do you factor a vendor's ethics into your projects, or just performance/price? Let's discuss. #AI #DevChat

updates.title: How to Host your Own Email Server
updates.title_zh: 如何自建邮件服务器
updates.title_en: How to Host Your Own Email Server
updates.tldr: 作者实践自建邮件服务器，分享从零配置到邮件被Gmail等主流服务商接受的完整步骤，涵盖SPF/DKIM/DMARC DNS设置、SMTP服务器与SSL/TLS配置，并提供接收邮件的简单方案。
updates.what: 本文具体指导如何配置邮件发送（Postfix SMTP、DNS记录、SSL证书）及接收（使用域名别名转发至Gmail等），解决发信信誉与反垃圾邮件机制问题。
updates.why: 避免依赖Mailgun/SendGrid等大厂服务，降低长期成本与隐私风险；证明自建虽需技术投入但完全可行，且能掌握基础设施控制权。
updates.action: 开发者可参考本文在测试域名上实践，重点配置DNS记录与SMTP认证，使用邮件测试工具验证 deliverability，再逐步迁移至生产环境。
updates.tweet: 自建邮件服务器真的难吗？看这位开发者如何从零配置，让邮件通过Gmail等大厂反垃圾检查。核心是DNS记录与SMTP安全配置，接收邮件竟可用别名转发这么简单。技术自主，拒绝绑架。
updates.tldr_zh: 作者实践自建邮件服务器，分享从零配置到邮件被Gmail等主流服务商接受的完整步骤，涵盖SPF/DKIM/DMARC DNS设置、SMTP服务器与SSL/TLS配置，并提供接收邮件的简单方案。
updates.tldr_en: Author documents building a private email server from scratch, detailing steps to achieve deliverability with major providers (Gmail, etc.) via SPF/DKIM/DMARC DNS, SMTP with SSL/TLS, plus a simple inbound mail solution.
updates.what_zh: 本文具体指导如何配置邮件发送（Postfix SMTP、DNS记录、SSL证书）及接收（使用域名别名转发至Gmail等），解决发信信誉与反垃圾邮件机制问题。
updates.what_en: A practical guide to configuring outbound email (Postfix SMTP, DNS records, SSL) and inbound handling (domain alias forwarding), addressing deliverability and anti-spam mechanisms like SPF/DKIM/DMARC.
updates.why_zh: 避免依赖Mailgun/SendGrid等大厂服务，降低长期成本与隐私风险；证明自建虽需技术投入但完全可行，且能掌握基础设施控制权。
updates.why_en: To avoid dependency on Big Tech email APIs (Mailgun/SendGrid), reducing long-term costs and privacy risks; demonstrates that self-hosting, while technical, is feasible and grants full infrastructure control.
updates.action_zh: 开发者可参考本文在测试域名上实践，重点配置DNS记录与SMTP认证，使用邮件测试工具验证 deliverability，再逐步迁移至生产环境。
updates.action_en: Developers should replicate the setup on a test domain, focus on DNS records and SMTP auth, use deliverability testing tools, then gradually migrate to production.
updates.tweet_zh: 不想被Big Tech邮件服务绑架？这位开发者自建邮件服务器全记录：搞定SPF/DKIM/DMARC，让Gmail正常收信。技术挑战有，但完全可控。👉 https://blog.miguelgrinberg.com/post/how-to-host-your-own-email-server
updates.tweet_en: Tired of Big Tech email dependencies? A developer’s full guide to self-hosting: configure SPF/DKIM/DMARC, get deliverability with Gmail. Technical but doable. 👉 https://blog.miguelgrinberg.com/post/how-to-host-your-own-email-server
updates.x_zh: 自建邮件服务器真的难吗？看这位开发者如何从零配置，让邮件通过Gmail等大厂反垃圾检查。核心是DNS记录与SMTP安全配置，接收邮件竟可用别名转发这么简单。技术自主，拒绝绑架。
updates.x_en: Is self-hosting email really that hard? One developer’s journey from zero to Gmail-accepted deliverability. Key: DNS records & secure SMTP. Inbound mail? Just use alias forwarding. Tech independence, no Big Tech lock-in.
updates.linkedin_zh: 作为开发者，你是否考虑过自建邮件服务器以摆脱第三方API依赖？这篇实战文章详细记录了配置Postfix、设置SPF/DKIM/DMARC DNS记录、启用SSL/TLS的完整流程，并分享了接收邮件的轻量方案。虽然需要投入时间研究邮件协议与安全配置，但能显著提升基础设施掌控力与长期成本效益。建议对邮件系统或私有化部署感兴趣的工程师阅读实践，从测试环境开始逐步验证 deliverability。
updates.linkedin_en: Developers: considering self-hosted email to avoid third-party API lock-in? This practical guide walks through configuring Postfix, setting up SPF/DKIM/DMARC DNS records, enabling SSL/TLS, and a lightweight inbound solution. While it requires time to understand email protocols and security, it greatly enhances infrastructure control and cost efficiency. Engineers interested in email systems or on-premise deployments should read and experiment, starting with a test domain to validate deliverability.
updates.threads_zh:
1/ 自建邮件服务器，听起来像噩梦？但这位开发者做到了：邮件成功进入Gmail收件箱，而非垃圾箱。核心不是魔法，是正确配置DNS记录（SPF/DKIM/DMARC）和SMTP安全。

2/ 接收邮件反而更简单：用域名别名直接转发到Gmail个人账户，无需运行完整IMAP服务器。这让你专注发信信誉，降低运维负担。

3/ 你会选择自建还是用SendGrid？自建适合重视数据主权、有运维能力的团队；第三方服务胜在快速集成。技术选型永远在控制力与便利性间权衡。
updates.threads_en:
1/ Self-hosting email sounds like a nightmare? This developer made it work: emails land in Gmail’s inbox, not spam. No magic—just proper DNS (SPF/DKIM/DMARC) and secure SMTP config.

2/ Receiving mail is simpler: use domain aliases to forward to a Gmail account. No need to run a full IMAP server. Focus on sending reputation, reduce ops overhead.

3/ Would you self-host or use SendGrid? Self-hosting suits teams valuing data sovereignty & ops control; third-party services offer speed. Always a trade-off between control and convenience.

updates.title: Another Steve Jobs Quote on Lower-Priced Macs
updates.title_zh: 史蒂夫·乔布斯再谈低价Mac：500美元电脑的DNA困境
updates.title_en: Another Steve Jobs Quote on Lower-Priced Macs: The $500 Computer DNA Dilemma
updates.tldr: 乔布斯2008年宣称不做500美元“垃圾”Mac，但iPad后，MacBook Neo或为满足PC需求而生，反映Apple产品策略演变。
updates.what: 本文回顾乔布斯2008年关于低价Mac的评论，分析Apple如何通过iPad覆盖低价市场，并探讨MacBook Neo作为潜在低价PC的可能性。
updates.why: Apple此前拒绝低价Mac因品质与品牌DNA；但iPad证明低价设备可行，而部分用户仍需传统PC功能，驱动Apple重新考虑低价Mac。
updates.action: 开发者应关注Apple硬件策略变化，评估应用对Mac/iPad的适配差异，并思考如何服务不同设备用户群。
updates.tweet: 2008年乔布斯拒绝500美元Mac，称会毁掉DNA。如今iPad覆盖低价，但MacBook Neo或回应PC需求。Apple如何在不牺牲品质下拓展市场？技术策略深度解析。
updates.tldr_zh: 乔布斯2008年宣称不做500美元“垃圾”Mac，但iPad后，MacBook Neo或为满足PC需求而生，反映Apple产品策略演变。
updates.tldr_en: Jobs once refused $500 "junk" Macs, but post-iPad, MacBook Neo may serve PC-demanding users, reflecting Apple's evolving product strategy.
updates.what_zh: 本文回顾乔布斯2008年关于低价Mac的评论，分析Apple如何通过iPad覆盖低价市场，并探讨MacBook Neo作为潜在低价PC的可能性。
updates.what_en: The article revisits Jobs' 2008 comments on low-cost Macs, analyzes how Apple covered the low-end with iPad, and explores MacBook Neo as a potential budget PC.
updates.why_zh: Apple此前拒绝低价Mac因品质与品牌DNA；但iPad证明低价设备可行，而部分用户仍需传统PC功能，驱动Apple重新考虑低价Mac。
updates.why_en: Apple previously rejected low-cost Macs due to quality and brand DNA; but iPad proved low-end viability, and some users still need traditional PC functionality, driving reconsideration.
updates.action_zh: 开发者应关注Apple硬件策略变化，评估应用对Mac/iPad的适配差异，并思考如何服务不同设备用户群。
updates.action_en: Developers should monitor Apple's hardware strategy shifts, assess app adaptation differences between Mac and iPad, and consider serving diverse device user bases.
updates.tweet_zh: 乔布斯曾言：“我们不懂如何做500美元不垃圾的电脑。”但iPad后，MacBook Neo或为PC需求而生。Apple策略演变启示：品质与市场细分如何平衡？🔍
updates.tweet_en: Jobs once said: "We don't know how to make a $500 computer that's not a piece of junk." But post-iPad, MacBook Neo may emerge for PC needs. Lessons in balancing quality & market segmentation. 🔍
updates.x_zh: 2008年乔布斯拒绝500美元Mac，称会毁掉DNA。如今iPad覆盖低价，但MacBook Neo或回应PC需求。Apple如何在不牺牲品质下拓展市场？技术策略深度解析。
updates.x_en: In 2008, Jobs rejected $500 Macs, citing DNA. Today, iPad covers low-end, but MacBook Neo may answer PC demands. How does Apple expand without compromising quality? Deep dive into tech strategy.
updates.linkedin_zh: 乔布斯2008年关于低价Mac的评论，揭示了Apple对品质的坚持。随着iPad成功，MacBook Neo可能成为服务PC用户的新尝试。对开发者而言，这提示需灵活适配多设备生态，同时保持应用核心体验。建议关注Apple硬件路线图，提前规划跨平台策略。
updates.linkedin_en: Jobs' 2008 remarks on low-cost Macs highlight Apple's quality commitment. Post-iPad success, MacBook Neo may target PC users. For developers, this means adapting to multi-device ecosystems while preserving core experiences. Monitor Apple's hardware roadmap and plan cross-platform strategies proactively.
updates.threads_zh: 乔布斯曾坚决不做500美元Mac，但后来有了iPad。现在MacBook Neo又来了？🤔 你觉得Apple该推出低价Mac吗？还是iPad已经足够？
updates.threads_en: Jobs once refused $500 Macs, but then came iPad. Now MacBook Neo? 🤔 Should Apple launch a budget Mac, or is iPad enough? Let's discuss!

updates.title: When Read­Directory­ChangesW reports that a deletion occurred, how can I learn more about the deleted thing?
updates.title_zh: ReadDirectoryChangesW删除通知中如何获取被删文件详情？
updates.title_en: How to get details of deleted items in ReadDirectoryChangesW notifications?
updates.tldr: ReadDirectoryChangesW的删除通知只提供文件名，无法获取文件类型/大小。解决方案：改用ReadDirectoryChangesExW并请求扩展信息，删除通知中将包含文件属性。
updates.what: 当ReadDirectoryChangesW报告FILE_ACTION_REMOVED时，由于项目已被删除，无法通过GetFileAttributesEx查询其属性（如是否为目录、文件大小），导致监控缓存无法准确更新。
updates.why: ReadDirectoryChangesW设计用于检测目录列表中的变更，依赖先通过FindFirstFile/FindNextFile构建缓存，再通过增量更新维护。但若项目被快速添加并删除，缓存中无记录，删除时无法获取信息。
updates.action: 若需在删除通知中获取被删项详情，应改用ReadDirectoryChangesExW，并在dwNotifyFilter中设置ReadDirectoryNotifyExtendedInformation。这样FILE_ACTION_REMOVED通知将包含FILE_NOTIFY_EXTENDED_INFORMATION结构，其中有FileAttributes和FileSize。
updates.tweet: 监控目录删除时，ReadDirectoryChangesW通知里只有文件名？想获取被删文件的类型和大小？升级到ReadDirectoryChangesExW并开启扩展信息，删除事件直接包含属性。
updates.tldr_zh: ReadDirectoryChangesW的删除通知只提供文件名，无法获取文件类型/大小。解决方案：改用ReadDirectoryChangesExW并请求扩展信息，删除通知中将包含文件属性。
updates.tldr_en: ReadDirectoryChangesW's remove notification only gives the filename, not file type/size. Solution: Use ReadDirectoryChangesExW with extended info to get attributes in the remove event.
updates.what_zh: 当ReadDirectoryChangesW报告FILE_ACTION_REMOVED时，由于项目已被删除，无法通过GetFileAttributesEx查询其属性（如是否为目录、文件大小），导致监控缓存无法准确更新。
updates.what_en: When ReadDirectoryChangesW reports FILE_ACTION_REMOVED, the item is already gone, so GetFileAttributesEx fails. You cannot determine if it was a file or folder, or its size, breaking cache consistency.
updates.why_zh: ReadDirectoryChangesW设计用于检测目录列表中的变更，依赖先通过FindFirstFile/FindNextFile构建缓存，再通过增量更新维护。但若项目被快速添加并删除，缓存中无记录，删除时无法获取信息。
updates.why_en: ReadDirectoryChangesW is for incremental cache updates. You build a cache via FindFirstFile/FindNextFile, then apply changes. If an item is added and deleted before you cache it, the remove event lacks details.
updates.action_zh: 若需在删除通知中获取被删项详情，应改用ReadDirectoryChangesExW，并在dwNotifyFilter中设置ReadDirectoryNotifyExtendedInformation。这样FILE_ACTION_REMOVED通知将包含FILE_NOTIFY_EXTENDED_INFORMATION结构，其中有FileAttributes和FileSize。
updates.action_en: To get details on remove, switch to ReadDirectoryChangesExW and specify ReadDirectoryNotifyExtendedInformation. The FILE_ACTION_REMOVED event will then include a FILE_NOTIFY_EXTENDED_INFORMATION struct with FileAttributes and FileSize.
updates.tweet_zh: Windows开发：ReadDirectoryChangesW的删除通知（FILE_ACTION_REMOVED）只有文件名，无法知道被删的是文件还是目录、多大。改用ReadDirectoryChangesExW + ReadDirectoryNotifyExtendedInformation，删除通知直接带属性。 #系统编程 #DevOps
updates.tweet_en: Windows dev tip: ReadDirectoryChangesW's remove event only gives a name. You can't tell file vs dir or size. Use ReadDirectoryChangesExW with extended info to get attributes in the remove notification. #SystemsProgramming
updates.x_zh: 监控目录删除时，ReadDirectoryChangesW通知里只有文件名？想获取被删文件的类型和大小？升级到ReadDirectoryChangesExW并开启扩展信息，删除事件直接包含属性。
updates.x_en: Stuck with only a filename on a directory delete via ReadDirectoryChangesW? Switch to ReadDirectoryChangesExW with extended notifications to get file attributes and size right in the remove event.
updates.linkedin_zh: 在Windows文件系统监控中，ReadDirectoryChangesW的删除通知常因信息不足导致缓存不一致。本文详解如何通过ReadDirectoryChangesExW的扩展信息机制，在删除事件中直接获取文件属性与大小，提升监控可靠性。建议基础设施开发者掌握此技巧以优化监控系统。行动：检查现有监控代码，评估升级到Ex版本的可行性。
updates.linkedin_en: In Windows filesystem monitoring, ReadDirectoryChangesW's remove notifications often lack details, breaking cache consistency. This post explains how ReadDirectoryChangesExW with extended information provides file attributes and size directly on delete, improving reliability. Infrastructure developers should adopt this. Action: Review your monitoring code and consider migrating to the Ex API.
updates.threads_zh: 遇到ReadDirectoryChangesW删除通知没详情？别急，Ex版本有扩展信息！它能在删除事件里直接告诉你被删的是文件还是目录、甚至大小。聊聊你在文件监控中踩过的坑？👇
updates.threads_en: ReadDirectoryChangesW remove event giving you no details? The Ex version with extended info has you covered—it tells you file vs dir and size right on delete. What's your biggest file monitoring headache? 👇

updates.title: A History of Operation Breakthrough
updates.title_zh: 突破行动史
updates.title_en: A History of Operation Breakthrough
updates.tldr: 回顾冷战时期大型国防科技项目，分析其系统工程、跨领域协作与风险管理，为现代AI与基础设施开发提供历史镜鉴。
updates.what: Operation Breakthrough是1950年代美国陆军主导的导弹防御研究计划，旨在整合雷达、计算机与拦截技术，是早期大规模复杂系统工程的典型案例。
updates.why: 它揭示了在政治压力与紧迫时间表下，技术整合、供应链管理及组织架构的挑战，其经验与教训对当今构建安全、可靠的大规模AI系统与关键基础设施有直接参考价值。
updates.action: 1. 在项目规划阶段引入历史案例复盘，识别潜在的技术与管理模式风险。2. 强化跨职能团队（硬件/软件/安全）的早期协同，避免后期集成灾难。3. 建立模块化架构，降低系统耦合度，以应对需求变更。
updates.tweet: 大型项目失败常因组织与流程，而非技术。回顾1950年代'突破行动'，看早期系统工程如何应对复杂集成。对构建安全AI与基础设施的启示：历史是最好的压力测试。原文链接⬇️
updates.tldr_zh: 回顾冷战时期大型国防科技项目，分析其系统工程、跨领域协作与风险管理，为现代AI与基础设施开发提供历史镜鉴。
updates.tldr_en: A review of a Cold War-era large-scale defense tech project, analyzing its systems engineering, cross-disciplinary collaboration, and risk management for modern AI and infrastructure development.
updates.what_zh: Operation Breakthrough是1950年代美国陆军主导的导弹防御研究计划，旨在整合雷达、计算机与拦截技术，是早期大规模复杂系统工程的典型案例。
updates.what_en: Operation Breakthrough was a 1950s U.S. Army-led missile defense research program aiming to integrate radar, computing, and interception technologies, a classic case of early large-scale complex systems engineering.
updates.why_zh: 它揭示了在政治压力与紧迫时间表下，技术整合、供应链管理及组织架构的挑战，其经验与教训对当今构建安全、可靠的大规模AI系统与关键基础设施有直接参考价值。
updates.why_en: It reveals challenges in technology integration, supply chain management, and organizational structure under political pressure and tight schedules. Its lessons are directly relevant to building secure, reliable large-scale AI systems and critical infrastructure today.
updates.action_zh: 1. 在项目规划阶段引入历史案例复盘，识别潜在的技术与管理模式风险。2. 强化跨职能团队（硬件/软件/安全）的早期协同，避免后期集成灾难。3. 建立模块化架构，降低系统耦合度，以应对需求变更。
updates.action_en: 1. Incorporate historical case reviews in project planning to identify potential tech and management pattern risks. 2. Strengthen early cross-functional team (hardware/software/security) collaboration to avoid late-stage integration failures. 3. Adopt modular architectures to reduce system coupling and adapt to changing requirements.
updates.tweet_zh: 冷战时期的'突破行动'如何塑造了现代系统工程？一文深度复盘历史大型项目，其技术整合与风险管理教训，对AI与基础设施开发者至关重要。读原文，避坑指南：https://www.construction-physics.com/p/a-history-of-operation-breakthrough
updates.tweet_en: How did the Cold War's 'Operation Breakthrough' shape modern systems engineering? A deep dive into a historical megaproject. Its lessons on tech integration & risk management are critical for AI & infra devs. Read to avoid repeating history: https://www.constr
updates.x_zh: 大型项目失败常因组织与流程，而非技术。回顾1950年代'突破行动'，看早期系统工程如何应对复杂集成。对构建安全AI与基础设施的启示：历史是最好的压力测试。原文链接⬇️
updates.x_en: Megaproject failures are often about org & process, not tech. Revisiting 'Operation Breakthrough' (1950s) shows early systems engineering tackling complex integration. Lesson for secure AI & infra: history is the best stress test. Article link ⬇️
updates.linkedin_zh: 在追求快速迭代的今天，我们常忽视历史大型项目的经验。'突破行动'作为冷战时期的系统工程典范，展示了在政治压力下协调多技术领域的成败关键。对于负责关键基础设施或安全系统的技术领导者，复盘此类案例能帮助识别组织架构、供应链与风险管理中的潜在盲点。建议：定期组织团队分析历史项目，将经验转化为现代敏捷开发中的检查清单。点击链接，深入了解这段如何影响我们今日技术决策的历史。
updates.linkedin_en: In our rush for rapid iteration, we often overlook lessons from historical megaprojects. 'Operation Breakthrough,' a Cold War systems engineering case study, reveals keys to coordinating multiple tech domains under pressure. For tech leaders building critical infrastructure or secure systems, reviewing such cases uncovers blind spots in org design, supply chains, and risk management. Action: Schedule regular team analyses of historical projects to translate insights into modern agile checklists. Click to learn how this history shapes our tech decisions today.
updates.threads_zh:
你们项目里有没有那种‘历史总是惊人相似’的时刻？冷战时期的‘突破行动’项目，简直是为现代AI基础设施开发写的预警手册。

1. 技术整合地狱：当时要硬连雷达、计算机和导弹，就像今天要把LLM、传统软件和硬件安全模块缝在一起。

2. 组织架构决定成败：军方、承包商、学术界扯皮，导致接口混乱——这不就是大厂里不同部门打架的翻版吗？

3. 风险管理靠‘冗余’：他们用多套独立系统防单点故障，这思路现在看依然经典。

讨论：你的团队从历史项目里挖到过最宝贵的教训是什么？
updates.threads_en:
Ever had a 'history repeats itself' moment in your project? The Cold War's 'Operation Breakthrough' reads like a warning manual for modern AI infra dev.

1. Integration hell: They had to hardwire radar, computers, and missiles—like stitching LLMs, legacy software, and hardware security modules today.

2. Org design is everything: Military, contractors, academia clashing over interfaces—sound familiar? That's just big-org departmental fighting.

3. Risk mgmt via redundancy: They used independent systems to avoid single points of failure—still a classic move.

Discuss: What's the most valuable lesson your team dug up from a historical project?

updates.title: Firmware Update for the Treedix TRX5-0816 Cable Tester
updates.title_zh: Treedix TRX5-0816线缆测试器固件更新
updates.title_en: Firmware Update for the Treedix TRX5-0816 Cable Tester
updates.tldr: Treedix TRX5-0816发布v2.4.06固件更新，修复eMarker读取问题，但仅限Windows工具。注意：v4.0为硬件更新，旧设备无法升级。
updates.what: 针对Treedix TRX5-0816 USB-C线缆测试器的官方固件更新，版本从v2.3升至v2.4.06，改善对带eMarker芯片的高级线缆的识别能力。
updates.why: 解决早期版本无法正确读取USB4/雷电3等高速线缆eMarker信息的问题，提升测试准确性；同时澄清版本混淆，避免用户误刷不兼容的v4.0固件。
updates.action: 1. 确认设备当前版本为v2.3；2. 通过官方链接下载v2.4.06更新包（仅Windows）；3. 严格按步骤操作：充电口连接电脑，按住功能键关机再升级；4. 更新后验证eMarker读取。
updates.tweet: Treedix TRX5-0816固件更新至v2.4.06，解决eMarker识别bug。重要：v4.0需新硬件，旧设备勿刷。更新需Windows，步骤详见原文。 #开发者工具 #硬件测试
updates.tldr_zh: Treedix TRX5-0816发布v2.4.06固件更新，修复eMarker读取问题，但仅限Windows工具。注意：v4.0为硬件更新，旧设备无法升级。
updates.tldr_en: Treedix TRX5-0816 gets v2.4.06 firmware fix for eMarker reading, Windows-only .exe. v4.0 is hardware-only, incompatible with existing units.
updates.what_zh: 针对Treedix TRX5-0816 USB-C线缆测试器的官方固件更新，版本从v2.3升至v2.4.06，改善对带eMarker芯片的高级线缆的识别能力。
updates.what_en: Official firmware update for Treedix TRX5-0816 USB-C cable tester, upgrading from v2.3 to v2.4.06 to improve recognition of advanced cables with eMarker chips.
updates.why_zh: 解决早期版本无法正确读取USB4/雷电3等高速线缆eMarker信息的问题，提升测试准确性；同时澄清版本混淆，避免用户误刷不兼容的v4.0固件。
updates.why_en: Fixes inaccurate eMarker reading for high-speed cables (USB4/Thunderbolt 3), improving test accuracy; clarifies version confusion to prevent attempting incompatible v4.0 hardware update.
updates.action_zh: 1. 确认设备当前版本为v2.3；2. 通过官方链接下载v2.4.06更新包（仅Windows）；3. 严格按步骤操作：充电口连接电脑，按住功能键关机再升级；4. 更新后验证eMarker读取。
updates.action_en: 1. Verify your device runs v2.3; 2. Download v2.4.06 update from official link (Windows only); 3. Follow steps precisely: connect to charging port, hold function button while powering off; 4. Post-update, test eMarker reading on high-speed cables.
updates.tweet_zh: Treedix TRX5-0816线缆测试器固件更新v2.4.06发布！修复eMarker读取问题，但仅Windows可用。注意：v4.0是硬件更新，旧设备无法升级。详细步骤：https://shkspr.mobi/blog/2026/03/firmware-update-for-the-treedix-trx5-0816-cable-tester/ #硬件测试 #USB #固件更新

updates.x_zh: Treedix TRX5-0816固件更新至v2.4.06，解决eMarker识别bug。重要：v4.0需新硬件，旧设备勿刷。更新需Windows，步骤详见原文。 #开发者工具 #硬件测试
updates.x_en: Firmware update for Treedix TRX5-0816 to v2.4.06 fixes eMarker detection issues. Critical: v4.0 requires new hardware—do not attempt on v2.x devices. Windows-only update process. Details: https://shkspr.mobi/blog/2026/03/firmware-update-for-the-treedix-trx5-08
updates.linkedin_zh: 专业硬件测试工具更新：Treedix TRX5-0816线缆测试器发布v2.4.06固件，显著提升对USB4/雷电3等高速线缆eMarker芯片的读取准确性。注意：v4.0为硬件迭代，旧设备无法软件升级。建议：1. 检查设备版本；2. 通过官方渠道下载Windows更新包；3. 严格遵循升级步骤（充电口连接、功能键组合操作）。更新后验证高级线缆测试结果，确保生产或维修质量。
updates.linkedin_en: Professional hardware testing tool update: Treedix TRX5-0816 cable tester releases v2.4.06 firmware, significantly improving eMarker chip recognition for high-speed cables (USB4/Thunderbolt 3). Note: v4.0 is a hardware revision; older devices cannot be upgraded via software. Recommended actions: 1. Verify your device version (v2.3); 2. Download the Windows-only update package from official sources; 3. Follow precise steps: connect via charging port, use function button combo during power cycle. Post-update, validate tests on advanced cables to ensure quality in production or repair workflows.
updates.threads_zh: 刚看到Treedix TRX5-0816线缆测试器的固件更新了！v2.4.06终于能正确读eMarker了，但只支持Windows。有人试过吗？另外，v4.0是硬件改版，老设备别折腾。更新步骤有点讲究，得按住功能键关机…
updates.threads_en: Just spotted a firmware update for the Treedix TRX5-0816 cable tester! v2.4.06 finally reads eMarkers correctly, but Windows-only. Anyone tried it? Also, v4.0 is a hardware refresh—don’t brick your old unit. The update process is specific: hold function button while switching off…

updates.title: Boy I was wrong about the Fediverse
updates.title_zh: 我对联邦宇宙的看法大错特错
updates.title_en: Boy I was wrong about the Fediverse
updates.tldr: 作者原以为联邦宇宙（如Mastodon）仅是逃离Twitter广告与算法的避世所，后意识到在资本与权力侵蚀传统媒体时，其去中心化、无单一所有者的基础设施特性，反而成为保障信息自由流通的关键。
updates.what: 联邦宇宙（Fediverse）是一组基于开放协议（如ActivityPub）互联的去中心化社交网络实例（如Mastodon、Pixelfed）。用户可自建或加入不同实例，数据与治理权分散，无单一公司控制。
updates.why: 当资本通过诉讼等手段压制传统媒体时，依赖广告和股东价值的中心化平台极易被收编或审查。而联邦宇宙因实例分散、无统一利益方，更难被整体压制或关闭，成为更坚韧的公共信息基础设施。
updates.action: 1. 评估ActivityPub等开放协议，理解其作为抗审查基础设施的潜力。2. 考虑为团队或社区自建或托管一个实例，掌握数据与规则控制权。3. 在中心化平台风险升高时，将Fediverse作为关键信息源的备份渠道。
updates.tweet: 联邦宇宙不是理想主义者的玩具。它是当中心化平台被资本侵蚀时，为数不多的、能保持信息流通韧性的去中心化基础设施。开发者应关注ActivityPub，评估自建实例的可能性。
updates.tldr_zh: 作者原以为联邦宇宙（如Mastodon）仅是逃离Twitter广告与算法的避世所，后意识到在资本与权力侵蚀传统媒体时，其去中心化、无单一所有者的基础设施特性，反而成为保障信息自由流通的关键。
updates.tldr_en: The author initially saw the Fediverse (e.g., Mastodon) as an escape from Twitter's ads/algorithms. He later realized its decentralized, ownerless infrastructure is actually critical for preserving a free flow of information when capital and power erode traditional media.
updates.what_zh: 联邦宇宙（Fediverse）是一组基于开放协议（如ActivityPub）互联的去中心化社交网络实例（如Mastodon、Pixelfed）。用户可自建或加入不同实例，数据与治理权分散，无单一公司控制。
updates.what_en: The Fediverse is an interconnected network of decentralized social platforms (e.g., Mastodon, Pixelfed) using open protocols like ActivityPub. Users join or run independent 'instances' with distributed data and governance, avoiding single-corporation control.
updates.why_zh: 当资本通过诉讼等手段压制传统媒体时，依赖广告和股东价值的中心化平台极易被收编或审查。而联邦宇宙因实例分散、无统一利益方，更难被整体压制或关闭，成为更坚韧的公共信息基础设施。
updates.why_en: When capital suppresses traditional media via lawsuits, centralized ad-driven platforms are vulnerable to co-option or censorship. The Fediverse's distributed instances, lacking a single point of failure or owner, are harder to shut down wholesale, making it a more resilient public infrastructure.
updates.action_zh: 1. 评估ActivityPub等开放协议，理解其作为抗审查基础设施的潜力。2. 考虑为团队或社区自建或托管一个实例，掌握数据与规则控制权。3. 在中心化平台风险升高时，将Fediverse作为关键信息源的备份渠道。
updates.action_en: 1. Evaluate open protocols like ActivityPub for their censorship-resistant infrastructure potential. 2. Consider self-hosting or managing an instance for your team/community to retain data and governance control. 3. Use the Fediverse as a backup channel for critical information when centralized platform risks rise.
updates.tweet_zh: 我曾以为Mastodon只是‘无广告Twitter’。错。当资本扼喉传统媒体时，联邦宇宙的去中心化架构使其成为更难被整体压制的公共信息基础设施。对开发者而言，理解ActivityPub等协议不仅是技术趋势，更是抗风险必需。
updates.tweet_en: I thought Mastodon was just 'Twitter without ads.' I was wrong. When capital chokes traditional media, the Fediverse's decentralized architecture makes it a public info infrastructure harder to suppress wholesale. For devs, understanding protocols like Activit
updates.x_zh: 联邦宇宙不是理想主义者的玩具。它是当中心化平台被资本侵蚀时，为数不多的、能保持信息流通韧性的去中心化基础设施。开发者应关注ActivityPub，评估自建实例的可能性。
updates.x_en: The Fediverse isn't a toy for idealists. It's one of the few decentralized infrastructures that maintains information flow resilience when centralized platforms are compromised by capital. Developers should watch ActivityPub and evaluate self-hosting.
updates.linkedin_zh: 对技术管理者与开发者：作者对联邦宇宙（Fediverse）认知的转变，揭示了一个关键趋势——去中心化基础设施正从‘替代品’变为‘必要备份’。当资本通过法律等手段影响媒体时，基于ActivityPub等开放协议、无单一所有者的网络，展现出更强的抗审查与生存能力。建议团队：1. 技术雷达中加入ActivityPub；2. 评估关键社区信息流通的冗余方案，考虑自建实例；3. 将分布式社交架构视为未来数字公共空间的基础选项之一。
updates.linkedin_en: For tech leaders & developers: The author's shift on the Fediverse reveals a key trend—decentralized infrastructure is moving from 'alternative' to 'essential backup.' When capital influences media via legal means, ownerless networks based on open protocols like ActivityPub show greater resilience. Recommendations: 1. Add ActivityPub to your tech radar. 2. Evaluate redundancy for critical community info flows; consider self-hosting. 3. View distributed social architectures as a foundational option for future digital public spaces.
updates.threads_zh:
1/ 我曾嘲笑Mastodon‘难用’，以为它只是反Twitter的临时营地。直到看到传统媒体被资本诉讼围剿，才明白：联邦宇宙的‘破碎’（无统一搜索、无推荐流）恰恰是它的盔甲。

2/ 中心化平台必须对股东负责，意味着可被收编。而联邦宇宙成千上万个独立实例，没有‘老板’能下令整体关闭或审查。这不是理想主义，是基础设施的实用主义。

3/ 开发者问：ActivityPub只是又一个协议吗？不，它是构建抗审查社交图谱的基石。如果你的产品/社区信息流通至关重要，现在就该测试Fediverse作为备份通道。
updates.threads_en:
1/ I mocked Mastodon's 'broken' UX, seeing it as a temporary anti-Twitter camp. Only when traditional media got sued into silence did I get it: the Fediverse's 'flaws' (no global search, no algo feed) are its armor.

2/ Centralized platforms answer to shareholders—meaning they can be co-opted. The Fediverse's thousands of independent instances have no single 'boss' to shut it all down. This isn't idealism; it's infrastructure pragmatism.

3/ Devs: Is ActivityPub just another protocol? No—it's a foundation for censorship-resistant social graphs. If your product/community's info flow is critical, test the Fediverse as a backup channel now.

updates.title: Blue Monday by New Order released, 1983
updates.title_zh: New Order《Blue Monday》发行，1983
updates.title_en: New Order's 'Blue Monday' Released, 1983
updates.tldr: 1983年New Order发行New Wave经典《Blue Monday》，其软盘造型唱片封套开创了实体媒介设计先河。
updates.what: 《Blue Monday》的软盘封套是音乐产业中物理媒介设计的里程碑，其镂空结构不仅保护唱片，更成为视觉标志，影响了后续科技产品的包装美学。
updates.why: 对开发者而言，此案例展示了跨领域设计思维：将当时主流的存储介质（软盘）形状转化为文化符号，体现了形式与功能的创新结合，对现代UI/UX和硬件设计仍有启发。
updates.action: 在设计中探索历史元素的现代转化，例如将复古科技符号融入产品包装或界面，增强用户的情感连接与品牌叙事。
updates.tweet: 《Blue Monday》软盘封套：1983年音乐与科技设计的跨界经典。对现代产品包装的启示？#NewOrder #设计思维
updates.tldr_zh: 1983年New Order发行New Wave经典《Blue Monday》，其软盘造型唱片封套开创了实体媒介设计先河。
updates.tldr_en: In 1983, New Order released the New Wave classic 'Blue Monday,' pioneering physical media design with its floppy disk-shaped sleeve.
updates.what_zh: 《Blue Monday》的软盘封套是音乐产业中物理媒介设计的里程碑，其镂空结构不仅保护唱片，更成为视觉标志，影响了后续科技产品的包装美学。
updates.what_en: The floppy disk sleeve of 'Blue Monday' is a milestone in physical media design within the music industry. Its cutout structure both protects the record and serves as a visual icon, influencing the packaging aesthetics of subsequent tech products.
updates.why_zh: 对开发者而言，此案例展示了跨领域设计思维：将当时主流的存储介质（软盘）形状转化为文化符号，体现了形式与功能的创新结合，对现代UI/UX和硬件设计仍有启发。
updates.why_en: For developers, this case demonstrates cross-disciplinary design thinking: transforming the shape of a mainstream storage medium (floppy disk) into a cultural icon, embodying innovative form-function integration that remains inspirational for modern UI/UX and hardware design.
updates.action_zh: 在设计中探索历史元素的现代转化，例如将复古科技符号融入产品包装或界面，增强用户的情感连接与品牌叙事。
updates.action_en: Explore the modern reinterpretation of historical elements in design, such as integrating retro tech symbols into product packaging or interfaces to enhance user emotional connection and brand storytelling.
updates.tweet_zh: 🎵 1983年的今天，New Order发行《Blue Monday》，软盘造型封套成经典。物理媒介设计如何影响科技产品美学？#音乐史 #设计灵感
updates.tweet_en: 🎵 On this day in 1983, New Order released 'Blue Monday' with its iconic floppy disk sleeve. How did physical media design shape tech product aesthetics? #MusicHistory #DesignInspiration
updates.x_zh: 《Blue Monday》软盘封套：1983年音乐与科技设计的跨界经典。对现代产品包装的启示？#NewOrder #设计思维
updates.x_en: 'Blue Monday' floppy disk sleeve: A 1983 crossover classic of music and tech design. Lessons for modern product packaging? #NewOrder #DesignThinking
updates.linkedin_zh: 作为开发者，我们常关注代码与架构，但历史设计案例同样值得深思。New Order的《Blue Monday》软盘封套不仅是音乐史上的创新，更是物理媒介设计的里程碑。它展示了如何将日常科技符号转化为文化标志，这对我们设计硬件产品、包装乃至数字界面都有启示。建议：在下一个项目中，尝试融入复古科技元素，增强产品的叙事性与用户情感连接。 #产品设计 #创新思维
updates.linkedin_en: As developers, we often focus on code and architecture, but historical design cases are equally worth deep reflection. New Order's 'Blue Monday' floppy disk sleeve is not only an innovation in music history but also a milestone in physical media design. It demonstrates how everyday tech symbols can be transformed into cultural icons, offering insights for our hardware products, packaging, and even digital interfaces. Suggestion: In your next project, try incorporating retro tech elements to enhance product narrative and user emotional connection. #ProductDesign #InnovativeThinking
updates.threads_zh: 聊聊《Blue Monday》的软盘封套！1983年就这么前卫，把软盘做成唱片套。现在回头看，这种跨界设计对咱们做产品的有啥启发？#设计讨论
updates.threads_en: Let's talk about the 'Blue Monday' floppy disk sleeve! So avant-garde in 1983, turning a floppy disk into a record sleeve. Looking back, what insights does this cross-disciplinary design offer for our product development? #DesignDiscussion

updates.title: It Depends
updates.title_zh: 视情况而定
updates.title_en: It Depends
updates.tldr: 技术决策无绝对答案。升级前必须评估应用兼容性、测试覆盖、业务风险与稳定性政策，否则可能导致生产故障。
updates.what: 文章通过资深开发者总说“视情况而定”的现象，揭示技术决策中隐藏的复杂变量，如系统依赖、LTS政策、测试缺口，批判简单二元思维，强调上下文决定一切。
updates.why: 盲目遵循“升级至上”可能引发级联故障、服务中断。理解依赖链与业务影响是保障系统稳定性和团队效率的关键，避免因疏忽造成不可逆损失。
updates.action: 提问时提供完整背景（应用版本、测试状态、业务窗口）；决策前进行影响分析与回滚计划；建立变更管理流程，平衡创新与稳定，记录历史教训。
updates.tweet: 资深开发者为何拒绝简单答案？技术决策依赖上下文。升级MySQL？需先升级应用。换Ubuntu新版本？考虑LTS稳定性。PHP升级？测试论坛兼容性。“视情况而定”是专业，不是敷衍。 #开发 #运维
updates.tldr_zh: 技术决策无绝对答案。升级前必须评估应用兼容性、测试覆盖、业务风险与稳定性政策，否则可能导致生产故障。
updates.tldr_en: No absolute yes/no in tech decisions. Must assess app compatibility, test coverage, business risk, and stability policies before upgrading to avoid outages.
updates.what_zh: 文章通过资深开发者总说“视情况而定”的现象，揭示技术决策中隐藏的复杂变量，如系统依赖、LTS政策、测试缺口，批判简单二元思维，强调上下文决定一切。
updates.what_en: Article uses senior dev's constant 'it depends' to expose hidden variables in tech decisions: system dependencies, LTS policies, testing gaps. Critiques binary thinking; context is everything.
updates.why_zh: 盲目遵循“升级至上”可能引发级联故障、服务中断。理解依赖链与业务影响是保障系统稳定性和团队效率的关键，避免因疏忽造成不可逆损失。
updates.why_en: Blindly following 'upgrade-at-all-costs' causes cascading failures and outages. Understanding dependencies and business impact is crucial for system stability and team efficiency, preventing irreversible damage.
updates.action_zh: 提问时提供完整背景（应用版本、测试状态、业务窗口）；决策前进行影响分析与回滚计划；建立变更管理流程，平衡创新与稳定，记录历史教训。
updates.action_en: Provide full context when asking (app versions, test status, business windows); conduct impact analysis and rollback plans before decisions; implement change management balancing innovation and stability; document past incidents.
updates.tweet_zh: 为什么资深开发者总说“视情况而定”？因为技术决策没有标准答案。升级前需评估：应用兼容性、测试覆盖、业务风险。盲目行动=生产事故。分享你的经历？ #技术决策 #DevOps
updates.tweet_en: Why do seniors always say 'it depends'? No universal yes/no in tech. Before upgrading: check app compatibility, test coverage, business risk. Rushing = outages. Share your story? #TechDecisions #DevOps
updates.x_zh: 资深开发者为何拒绝简单答案？技术决策依赖上下文。升级MySQL？需先升级应用。换Ubuntu新版本？考虑LTS稳定性。PHP升级？测试论坛兼容性。“视情况而定”是专业，不是敷衍。 #开发 #运维
updates.x_en: Why seniors refuse simple answers? Tech decisions depend on context. Upgrade MySQL? App must support first. New Ubuntu? LTS stability matters. PHP upgrade? Test forum compatibility. 'It depends' is expertise, not evasion. #Dev #Ops
updates.linkedin_zh: 作为技术负责人，我常被问“是否应该升级？”。答案总是“视情况而定”。决策涉及：应用兼容性、团队带宽、第三方依赖、业务连续性。盲目升级可能导致服务中断。建议：1. 提问时提供完整背景；2. 建立变更评估框架；3. 平衡创新与稳定。技术深度在于理解权衡。
updates.linkedin_en: As a tech lead, I'm often asked 'Should we upgrade?' Answer is always 'it depends.' Decisions involve: app compatibility, team bandwidth, third-party deps, business continuity. Rushing causes outages.建议：1. Provide full context when asking; 2. Establish change assessment framework; 3. Balance innovation vs stability. Technical depth is about understanding trade-offs.
updates.threads_zh: 你问升级，我说“视情况而定”？不是敷衍。曾因匆忙升级PHP导致论坛崩溃。技术决策像拼图：应用支持、测试覆盖、政策约束...缺一不可。你的团队有类似教训吗？ #技术管理 #经验
updates.threads_en: You ask about upgrade, I say 'it depends'? Not evasion. Once rushed PHP upgrade took forums offline. Tech decisions are puzzles: app support, test coverage, policy constraints... all pieces matter. Any similar lessons? #TechLeadership #LessonsLearned

updates.title: Agentic manual testing
updates.title_zh: 智能代理的手动测试
updates.title_en: Agentic Manual Testing
updates.tldr: 编码代理虽能自执行代码，但自动化测试仍有盲区，必须结合手动测试（如python -c或/tmp临时文件）确保功能完整。
updates.what: 一种工程模式：指导AI代理在编写代码后，通过直接执行（如命令行运行、临时文件）进行手动验证，补充自动化测试的不足。
updates.why: 自动化测试可能遗漏UI显示、启动崩溃等实际问题；手动测试提供真实环境反馈，对API和边缘案例至关重要，是质量保障的最后防线。
updates.action: 在提示词中明确要求代理使用`python -c`或`/tmp`临时文件进行手动测试，并人工检查执行结果，尤其关注边缘案例和API响应。
updates.tweet: AI编码代理能写代码，但别信它自动通过测试就完事。手动测试才是王道：用`python -c`或`/tmp`临时跑一跑，揪出自动化测试漏掉的坑。安全、质量双保障。#AI开发 #工程实践
updates.tldr_zh: 编码代理虽能自执行代码，但自动化测试仍有盲区，必须结合手动测试（如python -c或/tmp临时文件）确保功能完整。
updates.tldr_en: Coding agents can execute code, but automated tests have blind spots. Combine with manual testing (e.g., `python -c`, `/tmp` temp files) for full validation.
updates.what_zh: 一种工程模式：指导AI代理在编写代码后，通过直接执行（如命令行运行、临时文件）进行手动验证，补充自动化测试的不足。
updates.what_en: An engineering pattern where AI agents manually verify generated code by direct execution (CLI, temp files) to catch issues missed by automated tests.
updates.why_zh: 自动化测试可能遗漏UI显示、启动崩溃等实际问题；手动测试提供真实环境反馈，对API和边缘案例至关重要，是质量保障的最后防线。
updates.why_en: Automated tests can miss UI glitches, startup crashes. Manual testing provides real-world feedback, crucial for APIs and edge cases—the last line of defense for quality.
updates.action_zh: 在提示词中明确要求代理使用`python -c`或`/tmp`临时文件进行手动测试，并人工检查执行结果，尤其关注边缘案例和API响应。
updates.action_en: Explicitly prompt agents to use `python -c` or `/tmp` for manual testing. Review execution outputs, focusing on edge cases and API responses.
updates.tweet_zh: AI编码代理能写代码，但别信它自动通过测试就完事。手动测试才是王道：用`python -c`或`/tmp`临时跑一跑，揪出自动化测试漏掉的坑。安全、质量双保障。#AI开发 #工程实践
updates.tweet_en: AI coding agents write code, but don't trust test passes alone. Manual testing is key: use `python -c` or `/tmp` to run it yourself. Catch bugs automated tests miss. Better security & quality.#AIDev #Engineering
updates.x_zh: AI编码代理能写代码，但别信它自动通过测试就完事。手动测试才是王道：用`python -c`或`/tmp`临时跑一跑，揪出自动化测试漏掉的坑。安全、质量双保障。#AI开发 #工程实践
updates.x_en: AI coding agents write code, but don't trust test passes alone. Manual testing is key: use `python -c` or `/tmp` to run it yourself. Catch bugs automated tests miss. Better security & quality.#AIDev #Engineering
updates.linkedin_zh: 在AI辅助开发中，自动化测试并非万能。本文提出'代理式手动测试'模式：要求AI代理直接执行代码（如通过`python -c`或临时文件），模拟真实用户场景，发现测试覆盖盲区。建议团队将此纳入代码审查清单，尤其关注API行为和边缘案例，提升交付可靠性。行动：下次使用AI编码时，主动添加手动测试步骤。
updates.linkedin_en: In AI-assisted development, automated tests aren't enough. 'Agentic manual testing' means having AI agents directly execute code (e.g., `python -c`, temp files) to simulate real usage and catch blind spots. Integrate this into your code review checklist, focusing on API behavior and edge cases. Action: Next time you use an AI coder, explicitly prompt for manual verification.
updates.threads_zh: 你们让AI写代码后，会自己跑一遍吗？自动化测试通过了，但实际用起来可能还有坑。试试用`python -c`或`/tmp`让代理手动测，经常能发现意外问题。大家有啥手动测试的妙招？
updates.threads_en: Do you manually run AI-generated code after tests pass? Automated tests can miss real-world issues. Try agentic manual testing with `python -c` or `/tmp`—often reveals surprises. Share your manual testing tips?

updates.title: How I think systemd IP address restrictions on socket units works
updates.title_zh: systemd socket单元IP限制：仅过滤入站连接
updates.title_en: Systemd Socket IP Restrictions: Inbound-Only Filtering
updates.tldr: 在systemd .socket单元设置IPAddressAllow/Deny，仅限制对该socket的入站访问，不影响服务自身出站连接（如DNS查询）。
updates.what: systemd的IP地址控制（IPAddressAllow/Deny）通过eBPF实现。当配置在.socket单元时，规则仅应用于该socket的入站流量，服务进程的出站流量不受影响。
updates.why: 这提供了精细的入站访问控制，避免了在.service单元上设置IP限制时，会同时阻断服务必要出站连接（如API调用、DNS）的问题。实现了“只过滤谁可以连我，不限制我可以连谁”。
updates.action: 若需为socket激活服务（如ssh.socket）配置入站IP白名单，直接在.socket单元文件中使用IPAddressAllow=，而非在对应的.service单元中设置。验证时可检查对应cgroup下的eBPF程序（bpftool cgroup list）。
updates.tweet: 在systemd .socket单元设置IP限制，竟只影响入站？是的！这通过eBPF直接附着在socket上实现，服务进程的出站连接（如DNS、API调用）完全自由。这是为socket激活服务设计入站防火墙的优雅方案。验证：bpftool cgroup list | grep sd_fw。
updates.tldr_zh: 在systemd .socket单元设置IPAddressAllow/Deny，仅限制对该socket的入站访问，不影响服务自身出站连接（如DNS查询）。
updates.tldr_en: Setting IPAddressAllow/Deny on a systemd .socket unit restricts only inbound access to that socket, not the outbound connections made by the activated service (e.g., DNS lookups).
updates.what_zh: systemd的IP地址控制（IPAddressAllow/Deny）通过eBPF实现。当配置在.socket单元时，规则仅应用于该socket的入站流量，服务进程的出站流量不受影响。
updates.what_en: Systemd's IP address controls (IPAddressAllow/Deny) are implemented via eBPF. When configured on a .socket unit, the rules apply only to inbound traffic on that socket, leaving the service process's outbound traffic unrestricted.
updates.why_zh: 这提供了精细的入站访问控制，避免了在.service单元上设置IP限制时，会同时阻断服务必要出站连接（如API调用、DNS）的问题。实现了“只过滤谁可以连我，不限制我可以连谁”。
updates.why_en: This enables fine-grained inbound access control without the downside of configuring IP restrictions on a .service unit, which would also block essential outbound connections (e.g., to APIs, DNS). It achieves 'filter who can connect in, but not who I can connect out to.'
updates.action_zh: 若需为socket激活服务（如ssh.socket）配置入站IP白名单，直接在.socket单元文件中使用IPAddressAllow=，而非在对应的.service单元中设置。验证时可检查对应cgroup下的eBPF程序（bpftool cgroup list）。
updates.action_en: To configure an inbound IP allowlist for a socket-activated service (e.g., ssh.socket), use IPAddressAllow= directly in the .socket unit file, not the corresponding .service unit. Verify by checking for eBPF programs in the associated cgroup (bpftool cgroup list).
updates.tweet_zh: 【systemd技巧】在.socket单元用IPAddressAllow/Deny，只过滤入站连接，不限制服务出站！完美解决服务需访问外部API但只想开放特定IP入站的问题。技术细节：通过eBPF附着在socket上。#Linux #系统管理
updates.tweet_en: 【sysadmin tip】Using IPAddressAllow/Deny on a systemd .socket unit filters ONLY inbound connections, NOT the service's outbound traffic! Perfect for services that need external API access but require specific inbound IPs. Implemented via eBPF attached to the so
updates.x_zh: 在systemd .socket单元设置IP限制，竟只影响入站？是的！这通过eBPF直接附着在socket上实现，服务进程的出站连接（如DNS、API调用）完全自由。这是为socket激活服务设计入站防火墙的优雅方案。验证：bpftool cgroup list | grep sd_fw。
updates.x_en: Setting IP restrictions on a systemd .socket unit affects ONLY inbound traffic? Yes! Implemented via eBPF attached directly to the socket, the service's outbound connections (DNS, APIs) remain unrestricted. An elegant way to firewall inbound access for socket-
updates.linkedin_zh: 在容器化或微服务环境中，为socket激活服务（如sshd、自定义网络服务）配置精细的入站网络策略时，可考虑使用systemd .socket单元的IPAddressAllow/Deny。此特性通过eBPF实现，仅影响socket的入站流量，允许服务自由进行出站连接（如DNS、外部API调用），从而在安全与功能性间取得平衡。建议在Ubuntu 24.04+或支持该特性的systemd版本中实践，并通过bpftool验证eBPF程序的附着状态。
updates.linkedin_en: When configuring granular inbound network policies for socket-activated services (e.g., sshd, custom network daemons) in containerized or microservice environments, consider using systemd .socket unit's IPAddressAllow/Deny. This eBPF-based feature affects only the socket's inbound traffic, allowing the service unrestricted outbound connectivity (e.g., for DNS, external APIs), striking a balance between security and functionality. Recommended for practice on Ubuntu 24.04+ or systemd versions supporting this, with eBPF attachment verified via bpftool.
updates.threads_zh: 刚搞明白systemd socket单元的一个实用细节：在.socket上设IP白名单，居然不影响服务自己“出门”（出站连接）！这设计真巧妙，解决了大问题。你们在生产环境有用过这个吗？怎么验证eBPF附着？
updates.threads_en: Just clarified a neat systemd socket detail: Setting an IP allowlist on a .socket unit DOESN'T restrict the service's own outbound connections! That's a clever design. Have you used this in production? How do you verify the eBPF attachment?

updates.title: I don't know if my job will still exist in ten years
updates.title_zh: 十年后，我的工作还会存在吗？
updates.title_en: Will My Job Still Exist in Ten Years?
updates.tldr: AI代理将重塑软件工程：资深工程师或转型为监督者，初级岗位首当其冲；未来十年取决于行业对AI能力的判断是保守还是激进。
updates.what: 核心问题是科技行业对AI代理能力的预期偏差——低估则缓慢替代，高估则引发人才短缺。
updates.why: AI正快速改变工程工作本质，初级/中级岗位首当其冲；理解这一偏差能帮助个人提前规划转型，避免职业风险。
updates.action: 立即开始学习AI代理协作与监督技能，深化系统设计能力，并拓展至安全、产品等交叉领域，构建“人机协同”的不可替代性。
updates.tweet: 软件工程师的未来：AI代理普及后，写代码减少，监督AI增加。你的岗位会先被影响吗？
updates.tldr_zh: AI代理将重塑软件工程：资深工程师或转型为监督者，初级岗位首当其冲；未来十年取决于行业对AI能力的判断是保守还是激进。
updates.tldr_en: AI agents will reshape software engineering: seniors may become supervisors, junior roles hit first; the next decade hinges on whether the industry under- or over-estimates AI capabilities.
updates.what_zh: 核心问题是科技行业对AI代理能力的预期偏差——低估则缓慢替代，高估则引发人才短缺。
updates.what_en: The core issue is the tech industry's expectation gap on AI agent capabilities—underestimating leads to slow displacement, overestimating triggers talent shortages.
updates.why_zh: AI正快速改变工程工作本质，初级/中级岗位首当其冲；理解这一偏差能帮助个人提前规划转型，避免职业风险。
updates.why_en: AI is rapidly changing the nature of engineering work, with junior/mid-level roles hit first; understanding this gap helps individuals plan transitions early and avoid career risk.
updates.action_zh: 立即开始学习AI代理协作与监督技能，深化系统设计能力，并拓展至安全、产品等交叉领域，构建“人机协同”的不可替代性。
updates.action_en: Immediately start learning AI agent collaboration and supervision skills, deepen systems design expertise, and expand into cross-functional areas like security and product to build 'human-AI synergy' as an moat.
updates.tweet_zh: AI不会立即取代所有工程师，但会彻底改变工作内容。资深工程师或转向监督，初级岗位先受冲击。未来十年，关键在行业对AI能力的判断。#AI #软件工程 #职业发展
updates.tweet_en: AI won't replace all engineers overnight, but will radically reshape the job. Seniors may shift to supervision, juniors hit first. The next decade hinges on the industry's AI capability bet. #AI #SoftwareEngineering #Career
updates.x_zh: 软件工程师的未来：AI代理普及后，写代码减少，监督AI增加。你的岗位会先被影响吗？
updates.x_en: The future for software engineers: as AI agents proliferate, less coding, more supervising. Will your role be hit first?
updates.linkedin_zh: 作为开发者，我们正站在AI变革的临界点。文章指出，未来十年软件工程将因AI代理深度重构，初级岗位首当其冲，资深工程师或转向“AI监督者”。建议立即行动：1. 掌握AI工具协作与代码审查新范式；2. 强化系统设计与跨团队沟通能力；3. 向安全、产品等复合领域延伸。人机协同能力将成为新护城河。
updates.linkedin_en: As developers, we're at an AI inflection point. The article argues that software engineering will be deeply重构 by AI agents in the next decade—junior roles first, seniors shifting to 'AI supervisors.' Actionable steps: 1. Master AI tool collaboration and new code review paradigms; 2. Strengthen systems design and cross-team communication; 3. Expand into hybrid domains like security and product. Human-AI synergy is the new moat.
updates.threads_zh: 读了一篇扎心的文章：软件工程师的工作未来十年可能大变样。AI代理普及后，写代码的时间会减少，监督AI的时间会增加。你觉得自己的岗位会先被影响吗？一起来聊聊应对策略。
updates.threads_en: Read a sobering piece: software engineering jobs could radically change in 10 years. With AI agents, less coding, more supervising. Which roles do you think get hit first? Let's discuss strategies.

updates.title: Advice for staying in the hospital for a week
updates.title_zh: 住院一周生存指南：给技术人的康复建议
updates.title_en: Hospital Week Survival Guide: Tech Worker's Recovery Advice
updates.tldr: 住院期间放弃所有生产力幻想，大脑需彻底休息。用娱乐和简单任务分散注意力，专注康复。
updates.what: 这是一份基于作者住院一周亲身经历的非医疗建议，针对习惯高效工作的技术人员，强调心理调适和康复优先于工作。
updates.why: 技术人常以高效为荣，但住院时强行工作会延长康复时间。接受休息能减少焦虑，促进身体恢复。
updates.action: 1. 提前准备离线娱乐清单（书籍、播客、游戏）。2. 设置工作自动回复，声明完全断联。3. 信任护理人员，接受他们的安排。
updates.tweet: 住院期间别想工作！技术人指南：放弃生产力，专注康复，用娱乐分散注意力。健康是1，其他是0。
updates.tldr_zh: 住院期间放弃所有生产力幻想，大脑需彻底休息。用娱乐和简单任务分散注意力，专注康复。
updates.tldr_en: Abandon productivity during hospitalization; your brain needs complete rest. Use entertainment and simple tasks for distraction, focus on recovery.
updates.what_zh: 这是一份基于作者住院一周亲身经历的非医疗建议，针对习惯高效工作的技术人员，强调心理调适和康复优先于工作。
updates.what_en: Non-medical advice based on a week-long hospital stay, tailored for tech professionals, emphasizing mental adjustment and recovery over work.
updates.why_zh: 技术人常以高效为荣，但住院时强行工作会延长康复时间。接受休息能减少焦虑，促进身体恢复。
updates.why_en: Tech workers pride on efficiency, but pushing work during hospitalization prolongs recovery. Accepting rest reduces anxiety and aids physical healing.
updates.action_zh: 1. 提前准备离线娱乐清单（书籍、播客、游戏）。2. 设置工作自动回复，声明完全断联。3. 信任护理人员，接受他们的安排。
updates.action_en: 1. Prepare offline entertainment list (books, podcasts, games) beforehand. 2. Set auto-reply for complete disconnection. 3. Trust medical staff and follow their安排.
updates.tweet_zh: 住院一周的血泪教训：别想工作！你的大脑在药物和疼痛中无法专注。技术人必读：放弃生产力，拥抱休息，用娱乐分散注意力。康复后效率更高。
updates.tweet_en: Hard lesson from a week in hospital: stop thinking about work! Your brain on meds can't focus. Tech pros: abandon productivity, embrace rest, use entertainment for distraction. You'll be more efficient after recovery.
updates.x_zh: 住院期间别想工作！技术人指南：放弃生产力，专注康复，用娱乐分散注意力。健康是1，其他是0。
updates.x_en: Don't try to work in hospital! Tech guide: drop productivity, focus on recovery, use entertainment for distraction. Health is 1, everything else 0.
updates.linkedin_zh: 作为开发者，我们追求效率，但住院时健康是唯一KPI。建议：1. 提前准备离线内容 2. 设置自动回复告知断联 3. 接受护理安排，信任专业。康复后回归，效率更可持续。
updates.linkedin_en: As developers, we chase efficiency, but in hospital, health is the only KPI. Recommendations: 1. Prepare offline content beforehand. 2. Set auto-reply for disconnection. 3. Trust medical staff and follow their安排. Return with sustainable efficiency.
updates.threads_zh: 你们住院时怎么过的？我试过 review code，结果头晕加剧。分享你的康复技巧：用什么打发时间？怎么心理调适？
updates.threads_en: How did you survive hospital stay? I tried code review, got worse headaches. Share your recovery tips: what to do for distraction? How to mentally adjust?

updates.title: Steve Jobs in 2007, on Apple’s Pursuit of PC Market Share: ‘We Just Can’t Ship Junk’
updates.title_zh: 2007年乔布斯谈PC市场份额：我们绝不能推出垃圾产品
updates.title_en: Steve Jobs in 2007 on PC Market Share: 'We Just Can't Ship Junk'
updates.tldr: 乔布斯2007年明确苹果核心战略：不以市场份额为目标，而是坚持‘不推出垃圾产品’的底线。这种产品哲学驱动了苹果后来的垂直整合，如自研M系列芯片，确保质量与体验。
updates.what: 这是乔布斯在2007年阐述的苹果核心产品哲学：拒绝推出自己都不愿推荐给亲友的‘垃圾’产品，即使这会影响短期市场份额。
updates.why: 对开发者而言，这揭示了苹果‘质量优先’的工程文化。它解释了苹果为何坚持垂直整合（如自研芯片），以控制从硬件到软件的全栈体验，避免被供应链或妥协设计拖累。
updates.action: 在你的项目中：1. 设立‘不推出垃圾’的质量红线，拒绝为短期需求妥协核心体验；2. 评估关键组件是否需自主可控（如自研服务、框架），以减少外部依赖风险。
updates.tweet: “我们绝不能推出垃圾产品。”——乔布斯2007年。苹果用20年证明：坚持质量底线，才能赢得长期忠诚。对技术团队的启示：拒绝低质交付，哪怕会慢一点。#工程文化
updates.tldr_zh: 乔布斯2007年明确苹果核心战略：不以市场份额为目标，而是坚持‘不推出垃圾产品’的底线。这种产品哲学驱动了苹果后来的垂直整合，如自研M系列芯片，确保质量与体验。
updates.tldr_en: Jobs’ 2007 stance: Apple’s goal isn’t market share but refusing to ship ‘junk.’ This product-first philosophy drove vertical integration (e.g., Apple Silicon), ensuring quality and user experience over volume.
updates.what_zh: 这是乔布斯在2007年阐述的苹果核心产品哲学：拒绝推出自己都不愿推荐给亲友的‘垃圾’产品，即使这会影响短期市场份额。
updates.what_en: This is Jobs’ 2007 articulation of Apple’s core product philosophy: refusing to ship ‘junk’—products they wouldn’t recommend to family—even at the cost of short-term market share.
updates.why_zh: 对开发者而言，这揭示了苹果‘质量优先’的工程文化。它解释了苹果为何坚持垂直整合（如自研芯片），以控制从硬件到软件的全栈体验，避免被供应链或妥协设计拖累。
updates.why_en: For developers, this reveals Apple’s ‘quality-first’ engineering culture. It explains why Apple pursues vertical integration (e.g., custom silicon) to control the full-stack experience, avoiding supply chain compromises or degraded designs.
updates.action_zh: 在你的项目中：1. 设立‘不推出垃圾’的质量红线，拒绝为短期需求妥协核心体验；2. 评估关键组件是否需自主可控（如自研服务、框架），以减少外部依赖风险。
updates.action_en: In your projects: 1. Establish a ‘no junk’ quality threshold—refuse compromises that degrade core user experience for short-term gains. 2. Evaluate if key components need in-house control (e.g., custom services, frameworks) to reduce external dependency risks.
updates.tweet_zh: 乔布斯2007年：苹果目标不是市场份额，而是‘绝不推出垃圾’。这种哲学驱动了苹果后来的垂直整合（如M系列芯片）。对开发者启示：质量红线比增长更重要。#产品哲学 #苹果
updates.tweet_en: Jobs, 2007: Apple’s goal isn’t market share—it’s ‘we just can’t ship junk.’ This philosophy drove vertical integration (Apple Silicon). Dev takeaway: Quality thresholds > growth. #ProductPhilosophy #Apple
updates.x_zh: “我们绝不能推出垃圾产品。”——乔布斯2007年。苹果用20年证明：坚持质量底线，才能赢得长期忠诚。对技术团队的启示：拒绝低质交付，哪怕会慢一点。#工程文化
updates.x_en: 'We just can't ship junk.' — Jobs, 2007. Apple proved over 20 years: sticking to quality builds long-term loyalty. Dev lesson: refuse low-quality deliverables, even if it's slower. #EngineeringCulture
updates.linkedin_zh: 乔布斯2007年的产品哲学至今影响科技行业：不追求市场份额而牺牲质量。这驱动了苹果的垂直整合战略，如自研芯片，确保全栈体验。作为技术领导者，我们应：1. 在团队中设立明确的质量红线；2. 评估技术债务，优先投资核心组件的自主可控；3. 用长期价值对抗短期增长压力。
updates.linkedin_en: Jobs’ 2007 product philosophy still shapes tech: quality over market share. It drove Apple’s vertical integration (e.g., Apple Silicon) for full-stack control. As tech leaders, we should: 1. Set clear quality thresholds in teams; 2. Assess tech debt, prioritize in-house control of core components; 3. Combat short-term growth pressure with long-term value.
updates.threads_zh: 乔布斯2007年说“我们绝不能推出垃圾产品”，当时很多人笑他不懂市场。现在看，这是苹果20年成功的基石。你的团队有类似的“不做什么”原则吗？#产品管理 #创业
updates.threads_en: Jobs said in 2007, ‘We just can’t ship junk.’ Many laughed. Now it’s Apple’s cornerstone. Does your team have a similar ‘won’t do’ list? #ProductManagement #Startups

updates.title: Pluralistic: Blowtorching the frog (05 Mar 2026) executive-dysfunction
updates.title_zh: 炙烤青蛙：危机如何驱动技术变革
updates.title_en: Blowtorching the Frog: How Crises Drive Tech Transformation
updates.tldr: 本文通过Twitter/X案例，阐述危机如何迫使系统变革，提醒开发者警惕平台风险，拥抱去中心化机会。
updates.what: 'Blowtorching the frog'指用极端危机避免温水煮青蛙。文中以Elon Musk收购X后引发欧盟监管和去中心化浪潮（如Mastodon）为例，说明动荡如何加速变革。
updates.why: 对开发者至关重要：平台依赖可能一夜崩溃。危机加速监管（如欧盟DSA）和去中心化采用，直接影响基础设施选型和产品策略。
updates.action: 1. 审计现有平台依赖风险；2. 实验去中心化协议（如ActivityPub）；3. 监控全球法规动态（如欧盟DSA）；4. 设计弹性架构，避免单点故障。
updates.tweet: 平台动荡即变革信号。Musk的X被'炙烤'后，欧盟DSA与Fediverse崛起。开发者：立即 diversify 依赖，实验去中心化协议，避免成为下一个温水青蛙。#平台风险 #开发者
updates.tldr_zh: 本文通过Twitter/X案例，阐述危机如何迫使系统变革，提醒开发者警惕平台风险，拥抱去中心化机会。
updates.tldr_en: Using Twitter/X's turmoil as a case study, this article explains how crises force systemic change, urging developers to mitigate platform risks and seize decentralized opportunities.
updates.what_zh: 'Blowtorching the frog'指用极端危机避免温水煮青蛙。文中以Elon Musk收购X后引发欧盟监管和去中心化浪潮（如Mastodon）为例，说明动荡如何加速变革。
updates.what_en: 'Blowtorching the frog' means using acute crises to prevent slow degradation. The article cites Elon Musk's X acquisition, which triggered EU regulation (DSA) and decentralized alternatives like Mastodon.
updates.why_zh: 对开发者至关重要：平台依赖可能一夜崩溃。危机加速监管（如欧盟DSA）和去中心化采用，直接影响基础设施选型和产品策略。
updates.why_en: Critical for developers: platform dependencies can collapse overnight. Crises accelerate regulatory shifts (e.g., EU DSA) and decentralized adoption, impacting infrastructure and product strategies.
updates.action_zh: 1. 审计现有平台依赖风险；2. 实验去中心化协议（如ActivityPub）；3. 监控全球法规动态（如欧盟DSA）；4. 设计弹性架构，避免单点故障。
updates.action_en: 1. Audit your platform dependencies; 2. Prototype on decentralized protocols (ActivityPub, AT Protocol); 3. Track global regulatory changes like the EU's DSA; 4. Design resilient architectures to avoid single points of failure.
updates.tweet_zh: 【技术洞察】危机是变革催化剂。Twitter/X案例显示，平台动荡催生去中心化浪潮与欧盟DSA监管。开发者：评估风险，拥抱ActivityPub等协议，确保技术栈韧性。#技术趋势 #去中心化
updates.tweet_en: Tech insight: Crises force change. Twitter/X's chaos accelerated EU regulation & decentralized alternatives. Developers: assess platform risks, explore ActivityPub. Build resilience now. #Tech #Decentralization
updates.x_zh: 平台动荡即变革信号。Musk的X被'炙烤'后，欧盟DSA与Fediverse崛起。开发者：立即 diversify 依赖，实验去中心化协议，避免成为下一个温水青蛙。#平台风险 #开发者
updates.x_en: Platform instability is a wake-up call. Musk's X blowtorched the frog—now EU DSA & Fediverse are rising. Devs: diversify dependencies now. Prototype with ActivityPub. #PlatformRisk #Dev
updates.linkedin_zh: 在平台动荡时代，开发者需重新思考基础设施依赖。本文分析Twitter/X危机如何驱动监管（如欧盟DSA）与去中心化创新。建议：1. 审计关键平台风险 2. 实验ActivityPub等协议 3. 跟踪全球法规。立即行动，构建抗脆弱技术栈。
updates.linkedin_en: In an era of platform volatility, developers must rethink infrastructure dependencies. This analysis of Twitter/X's crisis reveals how turmoil accelerates regulation (EU DSA) and decentralized innovation. Actionable steps: 1. Audit platform risks 2. Prototype with ActivityPub 3. Monitor global policies. Build resilient systems now.
updates.threads_zh: Twitter/X被'炙烤'后，去中心化社交突然火了？欧盟DSA法案会如何改变游戏规则？开发者们，你们在试Fediverse或ActivityPub吗？聊聊你们的实验和顾虑～
updates.threads_en: So Twitter/X got 'blowtorched' and now decentralized social is having a moment? EU's DSA could reshape everything. Devs: are you experimenting with ActivityPub or Fediverse? Share your prototypes and concerns—let's discuss.
